_doc: Bioclimatic archetype reference cells for climate_archetype_triple@1. Each entry pins a real-world locality whose Köppen-Geiger class is well-documented; the responder computes the per-encoder centroid (Clay v1.5 1024-D, Prithvi-EO-2.0 1024-D, Tessera 128-D) at this cell at registry-load time by recalling the encoder band there. New deployments can extend the list — every archetype must have ≥1 representative cell. Re-derive centroids from labelled Köppen-Geiger reference points per Beck, H. E. et al. 2018. Present and future Köppen-Geiger climate classification maps at 1-km resolution. Scientific Data 5:180214.
_centroid_protocol: At load: for each entry compute centroid[encoder] = recall(encoder_band, cell64_at(lat, lng), t_now). At classify-time: vote = argmax_a cos(recall(encoder_band, query_cell), centroid[encoder][a]). Margin = top - second-top.
_citation: Beck, H. E. et al. 2018. Scientific Data 5:180214. Köppen-Geiger reference localities; specific lat/lng chosen as canonical class type localities (Manaus = canonical Af; Riyadh = canonical BWh; etc.).
